user_story: As an Employee, I want to view a summary of my time off balances by type, so that I can track credits, taken, scheduled and remaining balance
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Time Off Summary screen; When the summary loads; Then I see per time off type the credits, taken, tentative, scheduled and balance amounts

user_story: As an Employee, I want to see pending and loss of pay time off details, so that I understand what is awaiting approval and any unpaid leave
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Time Off Summary screen; When the summary loads; Then I see pending approval, pending and approved loss of pay, and cancelled time off values

user_story: As an Employee, I want to refresh my time off summary, so that I see the latest balance figures
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Time Off Summary screen; When I click Refresh; Then the summary reloads with current data
